title: Push Button with Offset Shadow

description: Smooth fill animation from top to bottom with glowing effect.

description: Animated gradient border that shifts between vibrant colors smoothly.

description: Glowing neon green border with sweeping light beam effect.

description: Electric blue color with expanding glow effect for maximum impact.

description: Bold yellow border and shadow that translate on hover playfully.

title: Expanding Circle Fill Button

title: Floating Frame Button
